rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/29/21. Probate Code Section 9202(b) also requires notice if an heir or beneficiary was previously so confined, not just currently. Please file a copy of the death certificate for Mark Leon. The Court cannot order what has not been set forth in a verified pleading. Language regarding the payment of fees and costs from Administrator's personal funds will not be in the order without such agreement having been set forth in a pleading verified by the administrator. (There is no need to show a summary of account when an account is not part of the petition and a personal representative who is the sole beneficiary can waive an accounting in her own petition without a separate waiver.) Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues (and a revised proposed order, if applicable) must be received by the Examiner by no later than 3/19/21.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Form Gc-150 For Confirmation Of Opening Of The Guardianship Account
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues may include (but not limited to): 1) No GC-051 form has been filed to confirm the opening of an unblocked guardianship account to deposit the surplus funds held in the guardian's personal savings account; 2) No ex parte petition for an order to deposit all or part of the surplus funds in a blocked account has been filed; and 3) Nothing has been filed to update the Court on the Minnesota Supreme Court's review and disposition since the 01/04/2021 hearing, while the guardian continues to request additional fees to fund the underlying litigation. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARIO V. MARTINEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/28/21. (No earlier availability.) No courtesy copies of the declarations filed on 2/1/21 and 2/26/21 were received by the Examiner as of 3/5/21. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C. ] A proposed personal representative must sign and verify his own papers, not his attorney. [CRC 7.103(c).] Still no proposed order. [LRSF 14.7 A.] Courtesy copies and a proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 4/19/21.
